scenes.setting: Klein's room at night, studying beside Melissa before bed
scenes.text_anchor: Melissa, can you not rub my nose in it

scenes.setting: Klein's nightmare: Dunn Smith arrives, then a carriage flight that ends with Dunn revealed as the driver
scenes.text_anchor: Knock! Knock! Knock! Poundings on the door roused Klein

scenes.setting: Klein wakes alone in his room under the crimson moon
scenes.text_anchor: Sat up? Klein looked around, confused. He noticed

scenes.setting: The dark apartment corridor where Klein sees Dunn Smith's silhouette at the window
scenes.text_anchor: He opened the door and walked along the dark corridor
